message:
refactor(scope): remove Caps generic from hedge() and add manual test

Simplify hedge() signature by replacing Cx<Caps> with Cx (matching the
rest of the codebase after capability erasure).  Map spawn_registered
errors to JoinError::Cancelled with resource_unavailable reason instead
of propagating the raw error.

Adds test_hedge_combinator_manual covering both the primary-fast and
backup-wins code paths with a virtual clock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
